familyRules: Family-composition / eligibility rules not shown in rendered page content. Dual citizenship is allowed. null pending interactive calculator.

routes.name: Deposit (refundable bank deposit)
routes.notes: USD 500,000 refundable deposit, "refundable in the local currency after 3 years without interest". Currency USD (deposit denominated USD, refunded in EGP). Government fees, due diligence, CitizenX service fee, all-in total and family increments not shown in rendered page.

closedOrUnavailableRoutes.name: Contribute to Egypt economy (non-refundable treasury contribution)
closedOrUnavailableRoutes.reason: Marked "Not available" on CitizenX. USD 250,000 non-refundable contribution to the state treasury. Processing time shown as "Current data is not available, please talk with your Concierge". Route currently not offered / unavailable via CitizenX.

uncertain: /egypt/cost slug 404s; data taken from /citizenship-investment/egypt and /egypt main programme pages.
No CitizenX fee breakdown (government fees, DD per adult, service fee, all-in total) rendered for any Egypt route.
Family-composition increments and eligibility rules not shown.
Treasury-contribution route ($250,000) explicitly flagged 'Not available' on CitizenX even though it exists in the underlying programme.
